heroTitle: Canada’s First Nano Polymer Modified Bitumen Manufacturer
heroDescription: Bitumpro develops and manufactures advanced Nano Polymer Modified Bitumen (Nano PMB) engineered for road construction and infrastructure projects in Canada’s demanding climate. Our technology improves pavement durability, enhances resistance to freeze-thaw cycles, and supports longer-lasting infrastructure with lower lifecycle costs.
aboutUsDescription: Bitumpro is a Canadian infrastructure materials company focused on the development and production of Nano Polymer Modified Bitumen (Nano PMB). Backed by more than 25 years of leadership experience in bitumen production, refining, product development, and international supply, we provide high-performance asphalt binders designed to extend pavement life, reduce maintenance needs, and support more sustainable infrastructure projects.
ourVisionDescription: To become a leading North American manufacturer and supplier of advanced nano-enhanced bituminous materials, setting new standards for pavement performance, infrastructure durability, and sustainable road construction.
ourMissionDescription: To develop and supply innovative nano-engineered bitumen solutions that help municipalities, highway agencies, contractors, and asphalt producers build longer-lasting roads while reducing maintenance costs, environmental impact, and lifecycle expenditures.
ourValuesInnovationDescription: Advancing bitumen technology through nano-enhanced materials and high-performance asphalt binder development.
ourValuesSustainabilityDescription: Supporting longer pavement life, reduced maintenance needs, and lower emissions through local production and durable infrastructure materials.
ourValuesExcellenceDescription: Delivering consistent product quality, technical reliability, and dependable support for infrastructure projects.
ourValuesIntegrityDescription: Building long-term, trust-based partnerships with customers, contractors, suppliers, and infrastructure stakeholders.
ourProductsDescription: We develop advanced bituminous solutions designed for road construction, pavement preservation, and infrastructure projects across Canada and international markets.
bitumenForLandRestorationDescription: A nano-enhanced asphalt binder engineered to improve pavement durability, thermal stability, elasticity, and resistance to freeze-thaw cycles.
ecoFriendlyPackagingDescription: Future-ready emulsion technologies designed to support sustainable road maintenance, pavement preservation, and efficient infrastructure operations.
globalDistributionDescription: Protective nano-based asphalt solutions planned to help extend pavement life and reduce long-term maintenance requirements.
contactUsDescription: For more information about our Nano PMB technology, products, and infrastructure solutions, please contact us. Our team is ready to support municipalities, contractors, asphalt producers, and infrastructure stakeholders with technical guidance and project consultation.
canadaOfficeAddress: 1470 Camelot RD, West Vancouver, BC, Canada
readyToRestoreDescription: Contact Bitumpro today to explore how Nano PMB technology can improve pavement performance and reduce lifecycle costs for your next project.
